use_cases: Displaying work history entries with company, role, and tenure information
Creating a professional timeline of career experience for portfolios
Showing employment history in a clean, scannable format
ai_summary: A work experience component that displays career history entries with company details, job titles, and employment duration. Features a minimalist card-based layout with timeline styling, suitable for developer portfolios and professional profile pages. Typically includes company branding, role descriptions, and date ranges in a scannable vertical format.
